summary: Tested critical system fixes: deployment_date as single source of truth, new deployment structure (one entry per BnB with morning+evening teams), Live Dashboard date matching, and collection records using deployment_date. All 11 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified via Playwright.

issues: HTML compliance issue: <button> nested inside <button> in deployment card header. Edit/Delete buttons are inside the clickable header button. Not affecting functionality but should be fixed by using a div with role='button' or restructuring.
Minor accessibility warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent (not affecting functionality)

action_items: Consider fixing button-inside-button issue in Deployments.js by changing outer <button> to <div role='button'> or restructuring header
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ /api/system/operational-date endpoint returns correct format (YYYY-MM-DD) and timezone (Asia/Kolkata)
✓ Frontend fetches operational date from backend on mount (Deployments.js line 130-149)
✓ Live Dashboard fetches operational date from backend on mount (LiveDashboard.js line 24-36)
✓ Deployment cards show ONE entry per BnB (not separate morning/evening)
✓ Each deployment card shows Morning Team and Evening Team sections (Deployments.js lines 882-909)
✓ Add Deployment dialog has Morning Team and Evening Team selection (Deployments.js lines 1309-1340)
✓ Backend enforces one deployment per BnB per date - returns 400 for duplicates
✓ Collection records (shifts) use deployment.date as single source of truth (server.py line 949)
✓ Live Dashboard shows same date as Deployments page (both use backend's operational date)
✓ Live Dashboard shows Morning/Night hours breakdown per BnB
seed_data_creation: Backend tests created temporary test deployments for testing duplicate prevention - cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Critical fixes verified: 1) deployment_date is SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH - frontend fetches from /api/system/operational-date endpoint instead of using new Date(). 2) NEW deployment structure works - one entry per BnB with morning_managers and evening_managers arrays. 3) Live Dashboard uses same operational date from backend. 4) Collection records use deployment.date field (copied from deployment). All API endpoints working correctly.
passed_tests: Frontend: Deployments page shows operational date (Friday, Mar 20) from backend - VERIFIED
Frontend: Deployment cards show ONE entry per BnB (BNB 1, BNB 2) - VERIFIED
Frontend: Morning Team section visible in deployment cards - VERIFIED
Frontend: Evening Team section visible in deployment cards - VERIFIED
Frontend: Add Deployment dialog has Morning Team selection - VERIFIED
Frontend: Add Deployment dialog has Evening Team selection - VERIFIED
Frontend: Live Dashboard shows same date (03/20/2026) as Deployments - VERIFIED
Frontend: Live Dashboard shows Morning/Night hours breakdown per BnB - VERIFIED
features_verified: deployment_date as SINGLE source of truth - frontend uses /api/system/operational-date
NEW deployment structure - one entry per BnB with morning_managers+evening_managers inside
Live Dashboard matches deployment date from backend operational date endpoint
Add Deployment dialog has Morning Team and Evening Team selection
Collection records use deployment_date from deployment (not browser timestamp)
